vocab.meaning: nghi thức đánh dấu bước ngoặt cuộc đời
vocab.example: In my culture, receiving a gold watch upon graduation is a traditional rite of passage into the professional world.

vocab.meaning: minh chứng cho tình bạn của chúng tôi
vocab.example: The vintage timepiece my best friend gave me is a lasting testament to our friendship over the past decade.
I was quite taken aback when my uncle presented me with such a lavish gift for my twenty-first birthday.

vocab.meaning: đeo nó với sự tự hào
vocab.example: Ever since I was given this mechanical watch, I have made it a point to wear it with pride at every formal event.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: Every time I glance at the dial of the watch my father gave me, it never fails to evoke a sense of nostalgia.

vocab.meaning: giá trị về mặt tiền bạc
vocab.example: While the watch has significant monetary value, its true worth to me lies in the person who gifted it.

vocab.meaning: sự đồng điệu/phù hợp về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: The minimalist design of the watch has a perfect aesthetic synergy with most of my business attire.

vocab.meaning: sự ban tặng/quà tặng hào phóng
vocab.example: Receiving a top-tier smartwatch was a generous endowment from my parents to help me stay organized at university.
Gifting a watch is a gesture that is held in high regard in my family, symbolizing the importance of one's time.
The unique leather strap on the watch I received as a gift really makes it stand out from the crowd of modern gadgets.
